content:
先前因為我們的疏忽為各位帶來報名上的阻礙，實在抱歉，我們已經將谷歌表單的報名表更新為中英雙譯版。使用相同的連結即可。
然後也看到大家的討論了解到在賽制上可能表達不易於理解，於是我們對有趣的部分進行簡單概括：由賽事組製作的系統隨機出三組卡組（包括喚醒體＆命輪＆鑰令），每個卡組將只展露一個喚醒體＆命輪，玩家需以此作唯一依據判斷選擇卡組。唯一能做的就是調整位置。倘若卡組包含未獲取的請與賽事組聯繫，我們有提供全圖鑑的帳號借給選手。
也了解到大家顧慮比賽中出現強盛的otk卡組，從而產生負面影響。其實這概率非常小，首先要隨機到希洛，而希洛又不一定會是被展露出的喚醒體之一。
這屆比賽是一場以娛樂為目的的“友誼賽”，因此才冠以“N”之名。不論你是新手/回歸玩家/大師都可以沒負擔地報名，來參賽，玩得開心！
最後，也了解到因時區差無法參賽的海外玩家，在此表示收到了來自你們的參賽意願，謝謝你們。囿於目前賽事組所在地的時區及行程，我們無法顧及所有玩家（就連我們組內的主播），如果在其他時間舉辦比賽也可能導致選手與差異化對局數量的減少。期望這個問題可以被解決，可能不是我們，是同樣也熱愛着PVP的你。直播是每日賽後在b站上可看回放的，如今暫時參不了賽就看看回放當娛樂吧（？）
--來自賽事組的美工古霜（沒錯這個海報的始作俑者哈哈😜
thread_title: 🏆 忘却前夜第4届N厨杯┊The 4th 「N」′s Chef Cup of Morimens

content:
We apologize for any registration obstacles caused by our previous oversight sincerely. We have already updated the Google Forms registration form to a bilingual (Chinese and English) version. Please use the same link.

We are also noticed some discussion and realized that the format might be not easy to understand. Therefore, we have summarized the interesting parts: The tournament organizers will randomly generate three decks (including Awakeners&Fate Wheel&Key). Each deck will only reveal one Awakener and one Fate Wheel. Players must use this as the sole basis for choosing their deck. The only thing can control is to adjust the position. If your chosen deck contains any cards you haven't owned, please contact us. We offer accounts with a full card collection for players to borrow.

We also understand that some players are concerned about the powerful OTK decks appearing in the competition and bring a negative impact. The probability of this is very low. First, Helot need to be randomly selected by system, and then she may not necessarily be one of the revealed Awakeners.

This tournament is a "friendly" match for entertainment purposes, hence it is named within "N". Whether you are a beginner, a returning player, or a expect, you can register without pressure. Just participate, and have fun!

Finally, we also received several overseas players who are unable to participate due to time zone differences. We are grateful for your willingness to participate. Due to the time zone and schedule of the current tournament organizers, we cannot cater to all players (even the streamers within our team). Holding the tournament at other times might also reduce the number of players and the number of differentiated matches. We hope this problem can be solved. Perhaps not by us, but by you, who also love PVP. Our live stream is available for replay on Bilibili after the competition each day; for now, although you can't participate, just watch the replays for entertainment (?).
